homework.title: Set up your workstation and document it
homework.description: Install the required tools (ticketing client, VPN, password manager). Write a short document listing each tool, its version, and one problem you hit during setup and how you solved it.
homework.submitVia: Email the document to your instructor.

alex.feedback: Well documented. Next time include screenshots of the VPN config.

homework.title: Write 3 bug reports from the demo app
homework.description: Explore the demo application and find at least 3 bugs. Write a reproducible bug report for each using the template: title, steps to reproduce, expected result, actual result, severity.
homework.submitVia: Email the reports to your instructor.

homework.title: Resolve 5 practice tickets
homework.description: Work through the 5 practice tickets in the training queue. For each, write the resolution steps and the customer-facing reply.
homework.submitVia: Mark the tickets resolved in the training queue.
